metadata.name: wall_breaker_breach
metadata.notes: Issue 007 — WB suicides on a wall segment fencing the TH; Goblin follows through the breach. Walls at row 26 (cols 22-25) form a fence north of the deploy ring. TH sits north of the wall line. WB level 3 one-shots the target wall (320 dmg vs 300 HP) and splash-destroys adjacent walls in radius 1.5. Follow-up Goblin walks north through the former wall positions toward the TH.
metadata.author: issue-007
